overall.description: Cinematic aerial footage from the video game Cyberpunk 2077, showing a smooth drone flight through a futuristic neon-lit city at night. The camera approaches and descends into a narrow vertical canyon between two massive illuminated glass skyscrapers, transitioning from an open cityscape view to an enclosed urban corridor with building lights creating a blue-cyan glow.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic city skyline approach between mega-towers

events.description: approaching the narrow gap between the two main skyscrapers, preparing to enter the canyon

agents.ego_description: flying forward and slightly downward toward the narrow canyon between two illuminated glass towers

entered.detail: tall dark glass tower with grid of illuminated windows, forming the left wall of the approaching canyon
matching glass skyscraper with dense blue-white window lights and structural details
large illuminated advertisement screen on the right tower displaying a guitar graphic with cyan background
blue-tinted fog and atmospheric perspective covering the distant cityscape on the horizon
communication arrays and spires atop the skyscrapers silhouetted against the night sky

segments.scene_description: The drone approaches two massive illuminated skyscrapers in a futuristic cyberpunk city at night. The buildings feature dense grids of lit windows against dark glass facades, with a prominent digital billboard visible on the right tower. Atmospheric haze creates depth in the background as the camera moves steadily toward the narrow gap between the towers.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow vertical canyon between corporate mega-towers

events.description: fully entered the narrow canyon between buildings, sky no longer visible, enclosed by tower walls on both sides
ambient light decreases as the drone descends deeper into the canyon, with more shadow and localized neon illumination

agents.ego_description: flying steadily through the narrow canyon between skyscrapers, descending toward the illuminated street level visible far below

entered.detail: distant street level at the bottom of the canyon with scattered vehicle lights and illuminated ground level
structural skybridge connecting the left and right towers with illuminated walkway
vertical neon light strips and glowing signage attached to the building walls

segments.scene_description: The drone enters the narrow vertical canyon between the two skyscrapers, with the buildings now forming towering walls on both sides that block the sky completely. The digital billboard and horizon haze disappear from view as the camera descends toward the street level far below. Structural bridges span the gap between towers, and neon signage illuminates the canyon walls as the ambient light grows darker with depth.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drone flight that transitions from an expansive view of a futuristic cityscape into a claustrophobic descent between two towering skyscrapers. It begins by approaching a pair of massive illuminated buildings characterized by dense grids of lit windows and a prominent digital billboard against a hazy night sky. As the camera moves steadily forward, it enters the narrow vertical canyon between the towers, causing the horizon and the billboard to vanish behind walls of dark glass. The scene then shifts into a deep urban corridor where structural bridges span the gap and neon signage flickers along the walls. Finally, the camera descends further toward the distant street level, with the ambient light growing darker as the skyscrapers completely block out the sky.
